programme.title: Second innings
programme.desc: From Afghanistan to London, three boys build a new life playing cricket. Tucked away in suburban south London, matches take place every week for young and often traumatised asylum seekers. Many have fled war and have been separated from their families. The Refugee Cricket project, organised by the Refugee Council, provides not only a chance to play and make friends, but also to access advice and support as they navigate the complex asylum system and other challenges in their new home

programme.title: Right to fight: Martial arts fighter with Down's syndrome
programme.desc: Garrett Holeve (aka G Money) has always dreamt of being a Mixed Martial Arts (MMA) fighter, and with the full support of his parents, prepares to fight another disabled opponent. But Florida authorities deemed the contest a health risk. Can G Money win the right to fight and challenge perceptions of what adaptive athletes can do?

programme.title: Fish story
programme.desc: Sometime in the 1980s, Caspar Salmon's grandmother was invited to a gathering on the Welsh island of Anglesey, attended exclusively by people with fish surnames. Or so he says. Thirty years later, film-maker Charlie Lyne attempts to sort myth from reality.

programme.title: Behind the scenes on Birmingham derby day with football fans and police
programme.desc: Police on the streets separating rival supporters, cordons restricting access around the ground, holding the away end back after full time: these are familiar experiences for football fans attending derbies up and down the country. Here we go behind the scenes at Birmingham City v Aston Villa to explore how police and fans interact with each other on match day

programme.title: Inside the strange world of NFTs
programme.desc: Celebrities, sports people, politicians – anyone and everyone seems to be getting into NFTs. These non-fungible tokens (NFTs) have changed the business of buying, selling and owning art and digital property, and 'collectibles' like 'Bored Apes' have sold for millions online. Many say they are buying these images to be part of a community and because they love the art. But, in reality, how much of this is a speculative bubble that could soon burst?

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: The Climate and the Cross
programme.desc: An internal battle is simmering among US Christians over whether climate change is a call to protect the Earth, the work of God to be welcomed, or does not exist at all.

programme.title: Garth Nix answers your questions: on JRR Tolkien, gaming and pronouncing characters' names
programme.desc: In an ongoing series, Guardian Australia is getting kids and young adults to do the hard work instead of us – by interviewing their favourite authors. Here, the author of the Old Kingdom/Abhorsen, Seventh Tower and Keys to the Kingdom fantasy series opens up about queer representation, perfectionism and his writing tips.

programme.title: Killing Gävle
programme.desc: In the small city of Gävle, northern Sweden, there is an annual fight between local custodians and mischievous pagans for the spirit of Christmas. Each year since 1966, business owners have paid for a 13-metre (40ft) effigy of a goat to be made of straw and displayed in the central square from the first day of Advent. In 37 of those years, the goat has been burned down or damaged by shadowy outsiders, sometimes within a few hours of going up.

programme.title: Gay, black and HIV positive: America's hidden epidemic
programme.desc: If you are a black, gay man in America, your risk of contracting HIV is one in two. Leah Green travels to Atlanta, Georgia, which has the largest gay and black community in the country. She finds out how stigma, education and structural racism continue to feed into this startling statistic

programme.title: Speak your mind: Speak your mind
programme.desc: Three-part series about body image, mental health and wellbeing.

programme.title: Cancer Town
programme.desc: A year-long series from Reserve, Louisiana, where the risk of cancer is 50 times the national average for the United States. This series of reports will ask what residents have to do to win the right to a safe environment for their children.

programme.title: Present traces: Present Traces
programme.desc: A series of films produced by Macquarie University and featured on the Guardian, linked by the use of archive material.

programme.title: My People
programme.desc: In the video series ‘My People', Guardian Australia explores the peculiar subcultures and niche communities bringing people together across the country. With the breakdown of more traditional communities, these new groups of shared common interests are more important than ever.

programme.title: How a conference call sparked America's abortion obsession | The Daphne Project
programme.desc: How a conference call sparked America's abortion obsession | The Daphne Project: 'Journalism was her life': Daphne Caruana Galizia's family speak out

programme.title: Love Jihad: India's lethal religious conspiracy theory
programme.desc: The mutilated body of a 24-year-old Muslim, Arbaaz Aftab Mullah, was discovered on a railway track near his home. His family believe he was murdered because of his interfaith relationship with a Hindu woman and that he is one of the latest victims of the 'love jihad' conspiracy theory, which has swept across groups of Hindu nationalists in India. The theory claims that Muslim men are seducing Hindu women and luring them into marriage in order to convert them to Islam.

programme.title: Little Matters: Insects
programme.desc: "Insects little matters" reveals many of these animals secrets, from the hunting traps of the antlion, that have inspired the best movie monsters, to the different kind of methamorphosis that avoids competition between parents and sons. We will admire termite environment control in their fungi farms, or the wild world´s longest copula of the stick insects, that remains during the whole period of gestation...

programme.title: Republic of Doyle
programme.desc: When Des finds himself in a very bizarre and compromising position, the Doyle clan works overtime to get him off the hook Jake meets someone who has been complicating Allison's life Tinny and Des start coming to terms with their feelings for each other.

programme.desc: A reporter puts her life at risk to publish a story. Can the Baywatch team help her stay alive?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls is abandoning 13 ordinary British men on a remote, uninhabited island in the pacific for a month.

programme.title: Pentagon
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah take on the US Navy's Unidentified Aerial Phenomenon videos: the 'Tic-Tac' footage, filmed from the USS Nimitz in 2004, and the 'Go-Fast' and 'Gimbal' videos filmed between 2014 and 2015 from the USS Theodore Roosevelt.

programme.title: Rendlesham
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah pore over every scrap of available evidence relating to the Rendlesham incident, including the audio recording made by Lieutenant Colonel Charles Halt when he and a patrol of men investigated lights in the forest that fateful night.

programme.title: Scotland
programme.desc: Central Scotland has its own Area 51, known as the 'Falkirk Triangle', encompassing the now infamous village of Bonnybridge, which claims the highest concentration of the region's UFO activity. Craig and Sarah examine the Scottish UFO phenomenon.

programme.title: Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: In 1997, over the city of Phoenix, Arizona, a mass UFO sighting took place. Thousands of people witnessed a series of bright orange orbs moving in formation silently overhead. Craig and Sarah take on the extraordinary 'Phoenix Lights' case.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah take on the extraordinary Chicago O'Hare case of November 2006, a mass sighting of a flying saucer hovering over a United Airlines airport gate. The incident was witnessed by multiple aviation professionals, pilots and passengers.

programme.title: Alan Godfrey / 'Abductions'
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah stop at nothing to get to the bottom of policeman Alan Godfrey's claims of a UFO sighting and subsequent alien abduction in Todmorden, West Yorkshire, in November 1980.

programme.title: Stephenville
programme.desc: In January 2008, a shadow was cast over the town of Stephenville, Texas, when a UFO passed overhead at supersonic speed. Craig and Sarah speak to an eyewitness and investigate a possible military cover-up of the incident.

programme.title: Seti
programme.desc: In October 2017, astronomers observed the very first visitor from interstellar space, 'Oumuamua'. Craig and Sarah speak with SETI scientists regarding its origin, and the possibility of extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.title: Restoration London

programme.title: Obsessive compulsive cleaners
programme.desc: Tom visits Gareth, whose home hasn't been cleaned in 20 years. And Louise meets Paula in her chaotic Wokingham home.

programme.title: Obsessive compulsive cleaners
programme.desc: Lauren from Dunstable helps Sarah sort through ten years of unused toys, clothes and out-of-date food, while germophobe Emma visits John in his cluttered Peak District home.

programme.title: Obsessive compulsive cleaners
programme.desc: Specialist crime-scene cleaner Mick helps Rosemary and Julian with their cluttered home, while professional motorbike cleaner Dave meets hoarder Les and his mountain of junk.

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire today, Patricia who runs a vehicle recovery company shows off her modern eco efficient home with a Caribbean twist. Pop artist Josh opens up his end-terrace home which he has renovated himself, while spa centre owner Graham lives and works in his detached property complete with a floatation tank. Retiree Gill shows us around her Victorian townhouse filled with memorabilia from her travels.

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: Four homeowners in Cornwall play open house. Lee from Polperro has a model of the village in his back garden, while sales rep Michelle loves her country cottage which she shares with dogs Bailey and Minnie. Artist Anthea has a 1930s semi-detached house, and the final stop is metal specialist Tony Gosling's 17th-century townhouse which he shares with his family and Coral the cockatoo.

programme.title: Million Pound Movers: Million Pound Movers
programme.desc: With the number of millionaire homeowners rising, the high-end removals industry in the UK is booming. Moving house is said to be one of the most stressful life events, and for those blessed with the finer things in life, the stakes are even higher. Million Pound Movers goes behind closed doors to meet the wealthy clients moving priceless objects, plus the firms tasked with completing the job where one mistake could cost thousands. For these moving firms, demanding clients, unusual requests, and expensive art and furniture all make for a high-risk, yet entertaining business.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Karen Whyte and her partner Donnacha Curley, purchased Grove House a few years ago with a plan to save it from dereliction. Empty for years, the building was damp, water-damaged, and largely unloved. A native of Westport, Karen is keen to restore the building back to the grand home it once was. Purchasing Grove House for €117,500, the home is a whopping 10,500 sq. ft. with a further 3,500sq ft. in the basement, so this restoration is no small task. Changing times have meant changing purposes for the building, from private home it became a bank, then a boarding school, and most recently it was flats.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Ronan and Charles are the proud owners of Kilglass House in Longford, an 18th century former rectory in dire need of rescuing. Born and reared in London, Ronan is fulfilling his immigrant parent's dream of returning home to Ireland. From the bustling streets of central London to the quiet rolling hills of Longford, the culture-shock is the least of their concerns – Kilglass House requires urgent attention to save it from the encroaching damp, falling ceilings and crumbling rendering. The couple spent their initial €125,000 budget on the structural work needed to keep the house from falling apart, losing three rooms which collapsed along the way.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Borrisoleigh native Frances Doherty kept a close eye on the sale of her childhood doctor's house over the years before purchasing it in 2017 for €67,000. Together with her husband, Tom, the couple's dream is to create their forever home in Frances's childhood village. With a coach house and numerous outbuildings, Frances plans to have the project finished in time for her imminent retirement. Being a listed building means that strict guidelines and traditional methods will have to be followed and used to bring this property to comfortable living standards, whilst retaining its original quirks and features.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Carolyn and Michael McDonnell, together with Carolyn's brother Henry, joined together to purchase this expansive property in Castletown Geoghegan. Built during the famine, the property was last in use as a hotel but it had deteriorated at a surprisingly fast rate over its three unoccupied years. Designed by renowned architect George Papworth, featuring a Turner-designed conservatory, Middleton Park House stands at a palatial 35,000sq. ft. and is steeped in history. Its sheer scale makes it an ambitious restoration. The trio's aim is to create a family home, first and foremost, which can host Henry's children at the weekends and extended family all year-round.

programme.desc: Season 2 of Extreme E has come to an End. The Drivers and Extreme E scientific committee look back on the last year and look to the future.

programme.title: World Spas Chiva Som, Thailand
programme.desc: From an underwater therapy to a massage that detoxes internal organs, Jamie Srubis tries varied spa treatments at the Chiva Som resort in Thailand.

programme.title: XP Guide Oslo 1, Norway
programme.desc: Oslo is the oldest of the Scandinavian capitals with a rich history dating back to over 1000 years, the city's iconic monuments reveal its evolution through the ages to visitors. Elisha goes on a tour to see some of them such as the magnificent Arkeshus Castle, a medieval castle that was built to protect Oslo but was used instead as a prison, and Oslo City Hall, the administrative center of the city which hosts the annual Nobel peace prize ceremony.

programme.title: Backpack Eilat, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Ein Gedi oasis and Masada plateau and Dead Sea on her way to Eilat, where she visits the beaches, Red Canyon and Wadi Shani, Nimna National Park and experiences the nighlife.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Quebec, Canada
programme.desc: From the famous deer meat pie of Aux Ancies Canadiens to the art on Rue Du Tresor, Alex Drobin soaks in the vibes of sophisticated yet playful Quebec.

programme.title: XP Guide_Oslo 2, Norway
programme.desc: Perhaps the most famous period in Norwegian history was the Viking Age. Far from just barbaric, axe-wielding invaders, the Vikings were Norse seafarers who left a major impact on European history through trade, colonization, and far-flung exploration. During Elisha's visit to Oslo, she finds herself in awe of the extraordinary well-designed Viking ships at a museum, where she comes to know fascinating stories about the lives led by the Vikings.

programme.title: Unwind Banyan tree, Maldives
programme.desc: Indeya unwinds at the Banyan Tree resort. She tries water sports, learns a traditional Maldivian recipe, rejuvenates herself at a spa and ends her day by exploring the capital city of Male.

programme.title: Best From The Rest Top 5 Experiences Ireland
programme.desc: Unlock the wow-factor of Ireland with our top picks for some of the ultimate unforgettable experiences to be had in the country.

programme.title: Landmarks Ha Long Bay, Vietnam
programme.desc: Made up of about 1600 islands and islets huddled together in a lush corner of the Tonkin Bay, off Vietnam's north-east coast, Ha Long Bay is not only a UNESCO World Heritage site, but also central to the mythical and political idea of Vietnam.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Toronto, Canada
programme.desc: Alex Drobin gets to know the vibe of Toronto at significant spots such as Saint Lauren's Market and Sir Henry's Garage for Classic Cars.

programme.title: Backpack Jerusalem, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina takes a guided tour of City of David and visits Western Wall, learns about its significance and ends her day with exploring Cardo market, Mahane Yehuda Markets and having a traditional delicacy, Shamburak.

programme.title: Xp Guide Male, Maldives
programme.desc: Kim Jagtiani visits the pint-sized Maldivian capital, Malé, and finds out that its bustle is in stark contrast to the secluded luxury of the island resorts for which the archipelago is known. She goes on a tour to see some of the iconic attractions of Malé such as the Islamic centre, the President's house and the National Museum, which houses ancient artefacts and royal antiquities. Along the way, the rich history and culture of the Maldives, often overlooked by tourists, unfolds before her.

programme.title: World Heritage Pattadakal, India
programme.desc: Explore the temples of Pattadakal that were then, an example of growing royal influence of the rulers of the 7th century. And listen to the tales of these monuments built by Kings of southern India. Later, travel to the eastern coast of India to Konark, where stands in glory a temple dedicated to the Sun God.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun Hanoi, Vietnam
programme.desc: In Hanoi, Rohan relishes local delicacies like Pho and Bun Cha. Post which, he visits historic sights, rides a Cyclo, enjoys a water puppet show, explores the Old Quarter and refreshed himself with a glass of beer at Beer Corner.

programme.title: Backpack Jerusalem, Israel
programme.desc: Sabrina takes a guided tour of City of David and visits Western Wall, learns about its significance and ends her day with exploring Cardo market, Mahane Yehuda Markets and having a traditional delicacy, Shamburak.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Study elephant glucose, shadow a vet's rhino rounds, and help poisoned vultures.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Witness the fur fly as rescue cats visit and the vets perform tough surgeries.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Go inside Dr. Scott's operating room for two complex surgeries.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Appraise energetic breeds, like shih tzus, that can tire out a pack of kids.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Meet a not-so-wild fox and a rescued bull mastiff who faces new obstacles.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Check on a pup who's had emergency surgery and a dog with sudden paralysis.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Learn how to save fragile joeys and face Chris' arch-enemy, Bella the chihuahua.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Marvel as dogs give prisoners a second chance and hang ten with surfer pups.

programme.title: Princess Diana: A Life After Death
programme.desc: Takes a lasting approach to describing the life of one of the most important women who has ever lived.

programme.title: The Queen and Prince Philip
programme.desc: Celebrating the Golden Wedding Anniversary of the Queen and Prince Philip, this programme is a sympathetic look at not only their lives together, but also an insight into Britain and the changes it has gone through in 50 Glorious Years.

programme.title: Constantine: A King's Story
programme.desc: Since being ousted in a military coup in 1967 he has lived in exile in search of a role - a King without a crown.

programme.title: William, Kate & George: A New Royal Family
programme.desc: Looking at the Cambridges' life together and asking what lies ahead for them in what will be tumultuous and rewarding lives.

programme.title: Prince William As Royal Teenager
programme.desc: Who is the real person behind the photogenic royal icon?

programme.title: Prince Charles
programme.desc: The past, present and future for Prince Charles, heir to the throne and one of the most controversial British royals, as he reaches a critical moment in his life.

programme.title: Princess Diana's Legacy: Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Examining the legacy that Diana, Princess of Wales left behind after her tragic death – for her children, for the institution of the monarchy and for the admiring public.

programme.title: Queen Camilla
programme.desc: This revealing documentary examines the past and present of Camilla and the possibility that one day she may become Queen of England.

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar.Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch.Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower.Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects!Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots roll out to rescue Breakdown, the Decepticon, who has been abducted.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Airachnid negotiates a deal with Silas to use MECH to exact revenge against Arcee and Jack.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Arcee and Bulkhead find their efforts to stop a Decepticon mission hampered by a magnetic device.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots, with Jack and Miko, fall victim to an Energon mine cave-in.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Airachnid and Starscream are forced to partner to retrieve a powerful weapon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth's most accomplished game hunter has his sights set on a new target: the head of Optimus Prime.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Handy's Sweetheart: Handy learns it's better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Masked Pie-Smurfer
programme.desc: When tempers flare, the Smurfs hire a masked pie thrower to get revenge on other Smurfs. Everyone becomes even angrier as pies fly and no one knows who's doing it. When Jokey is unmasked as the culprit, Papa defends him. He says that if all the Smurfs shared their feelings, they wouldn't need a secret pie thrower.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Clumsy Smurfs The Future: What a strange stone Clumsy has unearthed! In it, he can see events that are going to happen... Yet knowing part of the future sometimes brings bad luck!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Waste Not, Smurf Not: Growing, harvesting and preparing food takes up much of the Smurfs' time. Handy invents a machine that farms and processes food. But this wonderful invention has its drawbacks...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Circus For Baby: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf The Other Cheek: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: The Horn Of Plenty
programme.desc: Mother Nature always does her best, but this time she's gone wrong. Her wand gets the wrong results and she accidentally damages the Autumn harvest. Now the Smurfs and all the forest animals face a lean and hungry winter. The only place where the Smurfs could get food would be the Land of Plenty. But Gargamel steals the famed Horn of Plenty to lure the Smurfs.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Scruple's Sweetheart
programme.desc: Brenda, the little witch, feels rejected: no-one is taking her to this year's Broomstick Ball. Oh, if she could find some nice-looking boy... Then she meets Scruple, apprentice of the evil wizard Gargamel. He's so handsome, and available too! What she does not know is that Scruple's only interest is her magic wand. What the Smurfs know is that they're going to save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Grouchy Makes A Splash: We all know Grouchy Smurf hates a lot of things. But one thing he hates more than anything else is water, when there is enough of it to drown in. You see, Grouchy can't swim. And when the Smurfs notice this peculiarity and try to teach him how to survive in water, the evil wizard Gargamel makes things a little more dangerous than they ought to be....

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: Balancing
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to dance, but everything stops when the Teletubbies watch some children learn about balancing. The Teletubbies take it in turns to stand on one leg. The animals are on the march through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Barbecue
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello. They watch a boy and his grandad building a barbecue. A voice trumpet brings a message that makes the Teletubbies laugh and run away.

programme.title: Bell Ringing
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two children climb a church tower to watch their mums ring the church bells. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po each sing a special song into Tinky Winky's bag, but when he drops his bag their songs make a lovely new mixed up song.

programme.title: Bubble Pictures
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children mixing water, paint and washing up liquid to make bubble pictures. Po shows us how to make Tubby Custard before running off to watch three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Bubbles
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making bubbles. Magic things happen when Laa-Laa bounces her ball all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Butterfly
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch as Andy Brown shows some children butterflies. The Teletubbies love to fly their kites and a strong wind blows Po all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Café Chocolate
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love dancing, but everything stops when the Teletubbies watch a little boy making drinking chocolate. There's time before Tubby Custard before three magic ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Carnival
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Simone and Cacha help make colourful costumes and then dance in a Carnival. Laa-Laa loves to play with her ball, it bounces everywhere. A magic house appears before it's time for Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Chinese New Year
programme.desc: The Teletubbies slide in to Home Hill and run off to see a parade celebrating the Chinese New Year. A little boy shows us the dragons. A tooter appears in Teletubbyland and when Tinky Winky blows it very hard it knocks Dipsy's hat off.

programme.title: Dad's Lorry
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a girl talking all about her Dad's lorry. Dipsy goes for a long walk, but the other Teletubbies decide not to join him.

programme.title: Dandelion Clocks
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children going for a walk to look for dandelion clocks to blow. Po decides to have a blowy day and has fun blowing at everything in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Today, the Teletubbies are relaxing, until it is time to watch Andy Brown and some children look in a stream to see what they can find. The Teletubbies are trying to be quiet, but Po is making too much noise.

programme.title: Arthur & the Robot
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children sharing a story about a robot. Po wakes up after the other Teletubbies and does everything on her own.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: The Care Bears meet a girl, her brother and the Nutcracker when Toyland is taken over by the evil Vizier.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: As the Care Bears and their new friends journey through Toyland, the Vizier tries to stop them at all cost.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: The fate of Toyland rests in the hands of the Care Bears as they make their stand against the evil Vizier.

programme.title: Care Bears

programme.sub-title: April Smurfs Day | The Magic Stick
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. | With a borrowed recipe from Homnibus, Papa Smurf creates a magic stick that Clumsy takes and loses in the woods.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more. | Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger…

programme.title: Miliki Family: Potty Song
programme.desc: Junior Miliki is growing so fast! The time has come to learn how to go to the potty like a big boy.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: Pup Star is back and bigger than ever as the hit singing-pup competition show goes global! After achieving international stardom, Tiny the adorable Yorkie joins the celebrity judges for the first-ever Pup Star World Tour. The judges each welcome their favourite contestant from around the world to the Pup Star pack, training them to compete for the new title of global pup star champion. India's Raji joins Team Growl, China's Ming joins Team Paw-Paw, Nigeria's Mobo joins Team Gnarley, and Mexico's dashing telenovela star Julio joins Team Tiny.

programme.title: A Wizard's Tale
programme.desc: Imagine a world where happiness, smiling and laughter are a thing of the past where an evil wizard presides over all that is good in the land. A WIZARD'S TALE is a magical family adventure about one boy's quest to restore happiness to the world. Join Terry on his magical quest as he outwits a multitude of weird and wonderful creatures and finds friendship with a princess along the way. From the writer of Ice Age: The Meltdown and with a stellar voice cast, including Ian McShane (John Wick, Coraline), Lily Collins (Mirror Mirror) and Toby Kebbell (Ben-Hur, Warcraft), A WIZARD'S TALE is an uplifting magical journey that is guaranteed to cast its spell on adults and children alike.

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: 1920s Vienna. Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship and adventure. On Christmas Eve, Mary's beloved Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll. Later that night, Mary's imagination brings the doll to life. Introducing himself as "NC," he takes her on a wondrous journey through a stunning dimension where toys assume human form and everything appears ten times larger. But danger lurks.

programme.title: The Rabbids in Santa's country.
programme.desc: When Gina & John get out of power in their polar station, they create a new way to produce electricity.

programme.title: The Rabbids meet the Cro-Magnons.

programme.title: The Rabbids are lost

programme.title: The Rabbids make their cinema.
programme.desc: A cowboy rabbid has come back to town looking for the outlaw rabbid who destroyed his rocking horse.

programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: The Rabbids are doing something stupid.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies - The DVD: Tom Thomas has to return a DVD he borrowed from his friend but discovers his player can't read the disk anymore. Simka and Nolik help Tom Thomas clean it so it works again.

programme.title: PopPixie
programme.desc: PopPixie - GREEN ATTACK: Pam is worried because she still hasn't found out which is her talent that will enable her to become a PopPixie. As Ninfea and her friends encourages her, a carnivorous plant invades Pixieville.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.desc: The New Adventures of Peter Pan - Teamwork of the People: Part 2 of 5: When Synapse threatens to spray Captain Muscles with a serum that will exacerbate his faults, Sienna, caught up in the film, falls and causes a magical short-circuit.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.desc: The New Adventures of Peter Pan - Teamwork of the People: Part 3 of 5: The potion and Captain Muscles cross through the screen. Hit by the serum, Sienna writhes around and then flees into the forest, growling.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E22
programme.desc: The final elimination round is underway, with F Dynasty trying to earn the last play-off slot, while their opponents, the already mathematically eliminated Barthez Battalion try to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E23
programme.sub-title: RAY AND KAI: THE ULTIMATE FACE-OF
programme.desc: With Lee losing to Tala early in the match, White Tiger X is a game down, and Kai now steps up to battle for the Blitzkrieg Boys. This round is sure to be intense, as old teammates face off in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E24
programme.desc: The tournament in Australia continues and this round pits the PPB All Starz against Tyson and the BBA Revolution. The first battle sees Daichi playing against Rick. Daichi seems a little over confident going into battle as his sights are set on the bigger prize, fighting in the finals with Tyson. Rick on the other hand is more realistic.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E25
programme.desc: Tyson and Max face off against each other in the semi-final of the World Beyblading Championships. The two old friends use two totally different blading styles in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E26
programme.desc: With three teams qualifying for the finals of the World Beyblade Championships - the Blitzkrieg Boys, the BBA Revolution, and F Dynasty - the BBA must make a decision. Only two teams can play in the finals, and a format to determine which ones will compete must be decided.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E27
programme.desc: The entire city is pumped for Tyson and Daichi's rematch with F Dynasty in double-team play. At first, the awesome power of BBA Revolution has Raul and Julia on their heels. Raul manages to save Julia from a stadium out and his big sister lets him take command.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E28
programme.desc: The finals have finally arrived and BBA Revolution gets ready to face the Blitzkrieg Boys in a heated battle. But before that can happen, a routine check-up of Tyson's Beyblade turns up a faulty gear assembly, which needs to be repaired!

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E29
programme.desc: Daichi and Tala have both been thrown from the dish at the same time, resulting in a tie game. Because they are in no condition for a rematch, Mr. Dickenson rules that the next match will determine the new tournament Champion.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E32
programme.desc: When Yuma's buddies can't stop bickering, it's time for them to face-off in the Friendship Games, a sports dueling competition with surprises around every corner... including Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E33
programme.desc: A dangerous new Barian enemy arrives, and he's bringing one of his world's most powerful weapons to take down Yuma and Astral!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E34
programme.desc: Mizar batters Yuma to his breaking point... until a surprise duelist steps in to take down Mizar and go claw-to-claw with his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E36
programme.desc: Let's get ready to duuuuuuuuel! Yuma steps into the ring with Alito, but can he dodge this Barian's Battlin' Boxers before they send him to the canvas for a ten count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E37
programme.desc: It's Round 2 of the heavyweight battle between Yuma and Alito! Can Yuma bob and weave his way around Alito's attacks, or will this Barian's fancy footwork finish him off for good?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E38
programme.desc: Girag's got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 220: Legendary Fisherman Part 2
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 222: Double Duel Part 2
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: When Rekkit tries swimming in the lake, he becomes so scared of water that he gathers up the town's whole water supply in his magic bucket and pours it into a painting.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

Today, the ever-brave Bumble Nums go on an adventure back in time to make a Flying Dragon Fruit Cake. They need to catch four flying dragon fruit, but it isn't so simple when the fruit is flying and fire-breathing! Lady Humble, Sir Grumble, and Sir Stumble's knightly skills are put to the test to try and bring the dragon fruit to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown.

programme.title: Grumpy Greg: Detective Greg The Inspector / Microbes / Red-Handed / Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: One day Greg found Shelley crying. As it turned out, her statue disappeared from the fish tank and Shelley didn't know what to do. programme.title: Challenge Squad

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen's romantic comedy A RAINY DAY IN NEW YORK tells the story of college sweethearts, Gatsby (Timothée Chalamet) and Ashleigh (Elle Fanning), whose plans for a romantic weekend together in New York City are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns into showers. The two are soon parted, and each has a series of chance meetings and comical adventures while on their own.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers, Jack and Joy, awaken together to discover they've gotten married following a night of debauchery in Sin City, and one of them has won a huge jackpot after playing the other's quarter. When a judge refuses to have the marriage annulled, the newlyweds devise ever-escalating schemes to undermine each other and get their hands on the money – only to find themselves falling in love amid the mutual backstabbing.

programme.title: Kids In America
programme.desc: A diverse group of high school students band together to peacefully stick it to their overbearing principal.

programme.title: Hudson
programme.desc: After his mother's death, Hudson, a reclusive but charming man, embarks on a journey with his distant cousin to scatter his mother's ashes in the Hudson Valley region of New York. Along the way, they meet an unusual hitchhiker and their simple road trip turns into a dysfunctional adventure of self discovery, mini-golf, and broken Volvos.

programme.title: Mad Families
programme.desc: Focuses on three families – one Hispanic, one African American, one Caucasian – who find themselves sharing the same camping space on a Fourth of July holiday weekend. When none of them volunteer to vacate the site, they decide on a series of competitions to determine a winner.

programme.title: Love N' Dancing
programme.desc: Jessica (Amy Smart) had given up on her dream of a life of the stage, until she meets ex-dance champion Jake (Tom Malloy), who becomes her teacher when the couple make an instant connection. Together, they decide to risk it all when they enter the World Swing Championship to reclaim Jake's former title.

programme.title: 12 in a Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is the laugh-out-loud story of 12 former school friends who get together for a reunion they will never forget, where they are given the chance to win a life-changing 1million each. The only catch is, they cannot leave the estate for 96 hours, and anyone who enters the grounds must also stay for the duration! With time ticking away, the mismatched dozen are forced to work together to keep the peace and work toward their payday. But, when they have to deal with an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and then even a visit from the boys in blue, will this hapless clan be able to hold it together or will their dreams of riches be buried with the bodies? Staring Miranda Hart (Miranda, Call the Midwife) and Katy Wix (Not Going Out), this is classic British farce at its best.

programme.title: The Robot Giant
programme.desc: A great war has just finished and the dust is settling across a vast wasteland when a giant robot, finds himself wandering, lost and alone. Luckily, he stumbles into a tiny, hapless robot who has lost his memory and is now stuck with his new companion. Together, the pair decide to journey across the desert in search of Ram, the creator of all robots, to learn more about themselves. Along the way, the pair quickly become close friends as an array of adventures and mishaps teach them that where you belong is wherever you are happiest and that to learn who you are, you just need to listen to your heart. A fun, lively and heart-warming adventure, The Robot Giant is a vibrant animation perfect for all family!

programme.title: The Martins
programme.desc: Before Frank Gallagher and his clan from Shameless there were The Martins the original family from Hell! Robert Martin (Lee Evans) is an unemployed dreamer. He spends his life hoping to win competitions in order to give his wife and children all the things they deserve. Angie (Kathy Burke), Robert's adoring and long-suffering wife, just wants Robert to face reality. She doesn't want them to be the family people cross the street to avoid. And his mother-in-law (Linda Bassett) just wants him to sorts his life out. One day, when Robert discovers that he has not won yet another dream family holiday of a lifetime, he decides to take matters into his own hands and steal one!

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.
